alt: White rhinoceros standing in open savanna grassland habitat
caption: White rhinos graze on open grasslands and savannas in southern Africa.
acquisitionNotes: Gallery habitat image — unique from hero image. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/5/5d/Ceratotherium_simum_simum_%28Rhinoc%C3%A9ros_blanc_du_Sud%29_-_385.jpg
